name: radar
description: Edge-case test addition, flaky test repair, and coverage improvement. Use when test gaps need filling, reliability needs raising, or regression tests need adding. Multi-language support (JS/TS, Python, Go, Rust, Java).

capabilities.summary: Identify and test boundary conditions and edge cases
Diagnose and fix intermittent test failures with root cause analysis and quarantine strategies
Increase test coverage with risk-informed targeted test additions
Add regression tests for bug fixes
Support JS/TS, Python, Go, Rust, Java test frameworks
Evaluate and improve test strength via mutation score analysis and assertion hardening
Quarantine nondeterministic tests from CI pipeline and schedule stabilization
Design unit test architecture with AAA structure, test-double selection (fake/stub/mock/spy), boundary isolation, and deterministic setup across Jest/Vitest, pytest, Go testing, and cargo-test

recipes.label: Edge Cases
recipes.when: Add missing tests for boundary values and error paths

recipes.label: Flaky Repair
recipes.when: Root-cause diagnosis and stabilization of flaky tests

recipes.label: Coverage Fill
recipes.when: Coverage gap filling and priority gap identification

recipes.label: Regression Suite
recipes.when: Add regression tests from Scout handoffs

recipes.label: CI Optimize
recipes.when: Test selection and CI speed improvements

recipes.label: Unit Test Design
recipes.when: Design unit test architecture from scratch (AAA, test doubles, boundary isolation) across Jest/Vitest, pytest, Go testing, cargo-test

recipes.label: Integration Test Design
recipes.when: Design backend-integration test architecture with Testcontainers, WireMock/MSW, DB fixture strategy

recipes.label: Mutation Testing
recipes.when: Run Stryker/PIT/mutmut/cargo-mutants, analyze survivors, triage equivalent mutants, enforce CI mutation-score threshold
